qa_pairs.question: What indicates a successful load of an injection file in Fluent?
qa_pairs.answer: If there are no problems with the file, no Console error or warning message will appear in Fluent.

qa_pairs.question: After an injection file is successfully processed, what information can be viewed in the 'Injections' dialog box?
qa_pairs.answer: You should see the same Injection name that was specified in the 'Set Injection Properties' dialog and be able to List its Particles and Properties in the console.

qa_pairs.question: How can one enable the updating of Discrete Phase Model (DPM) source terms every flow iteration in Fluent?
qa_pairs.answer: You need to open the Discrete Phase Model Dialog Box and select 'Interaction with Continuous Phase'.

qa_pairs.question: Where can the setting for enabling DPM source term updates per flow iteration be saved?
qa_pairs.answer: This setting can be saved in your case file or added via the journal file.

qa_pairs.question: What journal file commands can automate the DPM injection settings after solution initialization?
qa_pairs.answer: Examples include: `/define/models/dpm/interaction/coupled-calculations yes`, `/define/models/dpm/injections/delete-injection injection-0:1`, `/define/models/dpm/injections/create injection-0:1 no yes file no zinjection01.inj no no no no`, `/define/models/dpm/injections/list-particles injection-0:1`, and `/define/models/dpm/injections/list-injection-properties injection-0:1`.
